notes: GLM-9B is remarkably consistent: all 9 responses transcribe all 11 classes with correct days, times, titles, and notes (Embassy of India x2, Gabi on Taiji, VIC Runners on Calisthenics). No hallucinated classes or times anywhere. Differences are purely formatting (single table vs day-block tables, optional Category/Description columns). The only structural flaw is rep0/t0.7 dropping the Day column. The single-table variants (t0.1|rep0, t0.1|rep2, t0.7|rep1) rank highest for clean, complete, readily usable output.
